Line items represent reporting concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.
This table lists the identifiers for the investments. An investment may have more than one identifier. Each identifier is from an identifier scheme.

The maturity date range of the underlying investments reported on the Schedule of Investments.
